title: Module should not import itself
description: A module should not import itself as this creates unnecessary circular dependencies and serves no functional purpose. Self-imports can occur during refactoring or by mistake and should be removed to maintain clean module dependencies.
recommendation: Remove self-import statements as they serve no purpose and can create confusion in module dependencies.
impact: Code clarity and module dependency management risk

checks.message: Potential self-import detected - verify that this module is not importing itself
Potential self-require detected - verify that this module is not requiring itself
Import from current directory detected - ensure this is not a self-import
